IV-A.root_cause: A_t = r_max + Bhat[t+1] grows as ~24^T for T=20, gamma=0.95. beta = u_ref_used/(A_t*xi_ref) ~ 1e-29. Operator is effectively classical under certification constraints.

auto_resolutions.question: Phase II/III rerun (job b0ao4zigu) is still running concurrently with Phase IV-A initialization
auto_resolutions.resolution: Proceed with Phase IV-A. The work is additive (writes to results/weighted_lse_dp/phase4/). The audit step will use Phase III results that exist at audit time. Phase IV-A code path is independent of Phase III outputs except for the compatibility audit.

auto_resolutions.question: Activation search used random-policy pilot (non-spec-compliant)
auto_resolutions.resolution: Fixed: replaced with DP backward-VI V* pilot (spec §S5.1 compliance). Re-ran with 200 episodes. Gate improved from 0/11 passing to 10/11 passing but mean_abs_u still below threshold.
